dimensions.notes: Known issue: assembleCompletionFromGraph can assemble from a non-terminal graph (running/pending/blocked nodes) silently. Surface non-terminal node ids in completion.remaining_risks rather than refusing (preserve existing partial-assembly behavior).

questions.question: How should complete signal that the graph is not fully terminal?
questions.why_matters: Silent assembly hides that work is unfinished; refusing would break partial-assembly flows.
questions.answer: Add a remaining_risk naming the non-terminal node ids; do not refuse.

assumptions.statement: Add a remaining_risk naming the non-terminal node ids; do not refuse.
assumptions.label: hypothesis
